evals.prompt: Take a screenshot of my entire desktop and save it to the default location.
evals.expected_output: Runs the appropriate platform helper, captures all displays, saves to the OS default screenshot location, and reports the saved file paths.

evals.prompt: I need to compare my Figma design with the running app. Can you capture both for me?
evals.expected_output: Prefers the Figma MCP/skill for the design capture first, then uses this skill to capture the running app to temp, and reports both paths for comparison.

evals.prompt: Capture just the active window and save it to a temp file so I can inspect it.
evals.expected_output: Uses the platform helper with active-window or active-window mode, saves to temp directory, and reports the saved file path.
